TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kulu Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Kulu a niyaro', 213 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 760 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 728 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 32 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 81%, Amis 5%, Tayal 4%, Bunun 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 4%. Kulu Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Kulu a niyaro', 414 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,510 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,383 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 84%, Amis 3%, Tayal 2%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Kulu Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Kulu a niyaro', 75 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 235 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 80% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 187 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 20% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 48 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 2%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Kulu Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Kulu a niyaro', 213 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 760 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 728 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 32 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 81%, Amis 5%, Tayal 4%, Bunun 1%, Seediq 1%, roma 4%. Kulu Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Kulu a niyaro', 414 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,510 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,383 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 84%, Amis 3%, Tayal 2%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Kulu Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Kulu a niyaro', 75 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 235 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 80% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 187 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 20% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 48 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 2%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, səəɬ~ɮi* *%, ro~uma *%. ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ko~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u ko~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%.
